name: Successmore Being Public Company Limited
summary: Successmore Being Public Company Limited operates as a network marketing company. It operates through Multi-Level Marketing, Distributor Sales, and Rendering Services segments. The company is involved in the research, development, manufacture, and distribution of dietary supplements, cosmetics, skin care products, lifestyle products, home products, and plant supplement products. It also arranges seminars; and provides render services for staff training. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
